Fill this in while you still have the context. Right now is the cheapest this will ever be.

A week from now a fresh agent with no memory of today reads this and nothing else. Everything
you leave out, it will guess — and you'll find out it guessed wrong at review time, which is the
most expensive moment in the loop to find out.

`ready-for-agent` goes on when all four sections below are filled in AND you've green-lit it.
-->
